name: Staff of Wizardry
description: All the Staff of Power's arts, +1 to hit, and more: Paralyzation, Invisibility, Wall of Fire, Passwall, a Djinni's whirlwind, summoned Elementals (d4 for how many and which), and webs — sticky masses filling 1"×1"×2" a turn, burst by Giants in two turns, burned or slashed by flame (a Flaming Sword cuts through in one). Final Strike as the Staff of Power.
special_notes: Final Strike as Staff of Power
